name: monolythium-protocore
description: Release index for the protocore node binary. Each entry corresponds to a GitHub Release tag on this repository (https://github.com/monolythium/protocore/releases). Tools can read this file to discover the latest compatible release for a given channel without scraping the Releases page. The empty arrays below populate as releases are cut.

entry_shape.description: Documentation-only — the shape every release entry should follow once populated.
